chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Suit No.1935 OF 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.3681/2019. 2. For hearing of CMA No.14571/2018. 3. For hearing of CMA No.14572/2018. 10th April, 2019 Khawaja Shoaib Mansoor, Advocate for the plaintiff. Syed Muhammad Kazim, Advocate for defendants No.1, 7 & 8. --------- 1. The learned counsel for the plaintiff waives the notice of this application and seeks time to file objections. 2. Adjourned. 3. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of defendants No.1, 7 & 8 files statement which is taken on record, copy whereof has been supplied to the learned counsel for the plaintiff. Through the statement the defendants have stated that the original title documents of the suit property is lying with the defendant No.1 and if this Court directs the defendant No.1 same will be deposited with the Nazir of this Court. The learned counsel for the plaintiff submits that this application (CMA No.14572/2018) may be disposed of by directing the defendant No.1 to deposit the same with the Nazir of this Court within a period of seven days. Accordingly the defendant No.1 is directed to deposit the original title documents of property House No.54/1, Lane No.14, Phase VII, DHA, Karachi, with the Nazir of this Court within a period of seven days’ time. CMA No.14572/2018 is disposed of. To come up on 06.05.2019. Interim order passed earlier to continue till the next date of hearing. JUDGE Abrar
